fields.title: Fire Department Emergency
fields.description: There is a house on fire near Kongowea market. Smoke is very heavy and people are trying to remove things from inside. The fire seems to be spreading to the next shop.

fields.title: Fire Department Emergency
fields.description: A fire started in the kitchen of the third floor apartment. We tried to put it out but the smoke is too much and people are evacuating the building.

fields.title: Medical Department Emergency
fields.description: An elderly man collapsed near the bus stop. He is breathing but not responding properly. People around are trying to help but we need medical assistance quickly.

fields.title: Medical Department Emergency
fields.description: A child in the neighborhood is struggling to breathe and coughing heavily. Parents are worried and asking for medical help.

fields.title: Police Department Emergency
fields.description: Two unknown men are trying to force open a shop door near the street corner. They are acting suspicious and looking around constantly.

fields.title: Police Department Emergency
fields.description: Two groups of people are fighting loudly outside the apartment building. It is becoming aggressive and others are scared.

fields.title: General Department Emergency
fields.description: An electric pole has fallen after strong winds and wires are lying on the road. Vehicles are avoiding the area.

fields.title: General Department Emergency
fields.description: A large tree fell across the road after rain. Traffic is blocked and vehicles are turning around.

fields.title: Fire Department Emergency
fields.description: There is a big fire happening near the residential houses behind the main road. Ilianza kama moshi kidogo but now the flames are getting bigger and people are panicking. Some neighbors are trying to bring water with buckets but the fire seems to be spreading to the nearby wooden structures. Kuna watoto na wazee wengi around the area and they are being moved away for safety. The smoke is very thick and inaweza kuwa dangerous for breathing. We are worried it might reach the nearby shops if nothing is done quickly. Tafadhali fire department msaada haraka before the situation gets worse and more property is destroyed.

fields.title: General Department Emergency
fields.description: I am currently in a dangerous situation and need immediate assistance. A serious incident has just occurred nearby, and several people appear to be injured. There is loud shouting and panic in the area, and the situation feels unstable and unsafe. I can see smoke coming from a nearby building and people are running away from the scene. I am staying at a safe distance but I’m worried that the situation could escalate quickly. Emergency responders are not yet visible. Please send help as soon as possible and alert the appropriate authorities. My exact location is being shared through the app. I will remain alert and await further instructions. 🚨
